item.description:
### ✨ 本次更新
🛠 修复
- 修复 Excel / WPS 表格内容仅在预览中可见、列表卡片可能空白的问题 - 修复 Excel / WPS 结构化表格内容可能被误识别为代码的问题 - 修复 HEX 颜色值（如 `8DA5C1`）无法正确识别并展示颜色预览的问题
🎨 优化
- 优化 Excel / WPS 富文本复制保真，尽可能保留表格边框与原始格式 - 优化混合剪贴板识别策略，优先保留文本与富文本内容，减少被错误识别为图片的情况 - 优化设置页侧边栏激活色管理，改为语义化颜色资产，便于后续统一调整主题风格
---
### ✨ What's New
🛠 Fixes
- Fixed an issue where Excel / WPS table content could appear only in Quick Look while the list card preview stayed blank - Fixed an issue where structured Excel / WPS table content could be misclassified as code - Fixed an issue where HEX color values such as `8DA5C1` were not recognized and shown as color previews
🎨 Improvements
- Improved rich text fidelity for Excel / WPS copies to better preserve table borders and original formatting - Improved mixed clipboard detection to better preserve text and rich text content instead of capturing them as images - Improved settings sidebar active color management by moving it to semantic color assets for easier theme maintenance

### ✨ 本次更新
🛠 修复
- 修复快捷键删除后无法重新录入的问题 - 修复 Excel 大范围表格内容被错误识别为图片的问题
🎨 优化
- 优化快捷键录制稳定性与设置页交互 - 优化混合剪贴板识别，优先保留文本与富文本内容
---
### ✨ What's New
🛠 Fixes
- Fixed an issue where shortcuts could not be re-recorded after being cleared - Fixed an issue where large Excel table selections could be captured as images
🎨 Improvements
- Improved shortcut recording stability and settings interaction - Improved mixed clipboard detection to better preserve text and rich text content

### ✨ 本次更新
**🎨 优化** - 优化导航栏与「关于」页面 UI 展示，界面更清晰统一 - 优化国际化显示，提升多语言体验 - 调整 Hide Sidebar 位置，操作更顺手
**🛠 修复** - 修复从暗黑模式切换为“跟随系统”未实时生效的问题
**🚀 新特性** - 重构「排除应用」页面展示 - 支持批量添加与删除应用，提高管理效率
---
### ✨ What's New
**🎨 Improvements** - Refined navigation bar and About page UI for a cleaner, more consistent look - Improved internationalization display for better multilingual experience - Adjusted Hide Sidebar position for more intuitive access
**🛠 Fixes** - Fixed an issue where switching from Dark Mode to “Follow System” didn’t apply in real time
**🚀 Features** - Redesigned Excluded Apps page layout - Added support for batch add/remove to streamline management
